## Summary

<!-- What changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / Chore
- [ ] Security

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Coverage does not regress (`npm run test:coverage`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`) — if UI change
- [ ] Tested locally (`npm run dev`)

## Screenshots

<!-- If UI change, add before/after screenshots -->

## Security

- [ ] No new env vars (or documented in `.env.example`)
- [ ] No new deps with known CVEs (`npm audit`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
